outlook_paragraph: Ovintiv shows reduced drilling activity with only 13 active sites at decision date, all of which are continuously active and none newly activated, resulting in a sharp negative relative activity delta. This suggests stagnation in new development and potential production decline pressure into Q3 2023. Combined with a WTI environment averaging around $55 and a realized price discount, revenue is further constrained. At just 50% exposure to the observed drilling segment, the deterministic revenue forecast settles at approximately $2.67B, reflecting limited near-term operational momentum and moderate commodity headwinds.
